measurement_note: Size is P = wL, the padded word-rectangle cell count. The reference splits once and visits each cell once. A correct slower alternative re-splits and rescans the sentence for every cell, taking O(P times the sentence length) time; every legal tier completes and returns the same vertical rows.

cases.name: benchmark: eight columns by four rows

input.s: ABCD A A A A A A A

cases.name: benchmark: sixteen columns by eight rows

input.s: ABCDEFGH A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A

cases.name: benchmark: thirty-two columns by sixteen rows

input.s: ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOP A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A
